details: Beginning self-reflection analysis for group_norm pipeline run (March 10, 2026). Gathered all evidence: 4 breadcrumb files, 2 execution logs, REPORT.md, op_design.md, .tdd_state.json, git history (10+ commits), 3 analysis files, all kernel source files.

Identified key timeline: Phase 0-1 ~11min (11:50-12:01), Phase 2 ~14min (12:02-12:16), Phase 3 ~10min (12:18-12:27), Phase 4 ~60min (12:28-13:27). Total ~97min. Two pipeline runs visible in git: Feb 20-23 (old planner/designer pipeline) and Mar 10 (new architect pipeline). This analysis covers the Mar 10 run.

Self-reflection report written to self_reflection.md. 7 issues found, 8 recommendations. 3 new entries added to pipeline-improvements.md (#12, #13, #14). Top findings: (1) REDUCE_SCALAR scaler squaring undocumented, (2) Architect leaves alternatives unresolved, (3) Test template validation gap.
